texto: Everybody gets typecast in movies, but you have to make wise choices. I'd say around 90 percent of movie casting is about the way you look, so you have to fight that. If producers had their way, I'd only be in action films, but I'm interested in a more varied career than that.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Famke Janssen sobre temas ligados a trabalho. A afirmação “Everybody gets typecast in movies, but you have to make wise choices. I'd say around 90 percent o…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a trabalho, wise, fight, útil em momentos de fight e choices.

frase_original: Everybody gets typecast in movies, but you have to make wise choices. I'd say around 90 percent of movie casting is about the way you look, so you have to fight that. If producers had their way, I'd only be in action films, but I'm interested in a more varied career than that.
